episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 323: What's up with SNC/NCC Spikes?
episode.description: James & Cliff get you caught up on all the latest in Modern & Pioneer MTGO meta shifts, fast mover card prices, specs to watch and discuss the early spikes on many SNC/NCC cards.
